zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor於1170年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾代維諾可時，他的父親Cydifor ap Gwgon26歲，母親Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan24歲。他與Catrin verch Elidir Marchog在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Gruffud
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

nameMeanings.name: Gwyr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a byname from Welsh gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’. See also Wyn .

variants.name: Gwynn
meanings: Originally a byname from Welsh gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’. See also Wyn .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor was born in 1170, in Devynock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Cydifor ap Gwgon, was 26 and his mother, Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan, was 24. He married Catrin verch Elidir Marchog in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor est né en 1170, à Devynock, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cydifor ap Gwgon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Catrin verch Elidir Marchog à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor 1170 in Devynock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cydifor ap Gwgon 26 und seine Mutter Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan 24. Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Catrin verch Elidir Marchog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor è nato il nel 1170 nel Devynock, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Cydifor ap Gwgon, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Catrin verch Elidir Marchog nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydiforが1170年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアデvイノックで生まれた時，父Cydifor ap Gwgonは26歳，母Malltl verch Llewelyn fychanは24歳であった。イギリスウェールズでCatrin verch Elidir Marchogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor(이)가 1170년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 데비노크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cydifor ap Gwgon(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan(은)는 24세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Catrin verch Elidir Marchog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor родился в 1170 г. в местности девинокк, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Cydifor ap Gwgon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Catrin verch Elidir Marchog в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffudd Gwyr ap Cydifor nació en 1170, en Devynock, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Cydifor ap Gwgon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Malltl verch Llewelyn fychan, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Catrin verch Elidir Marchog en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
